headline: Bloom Energy (BE) Lands $5 Billion AI Power Deal And Wyoming Offtake Project
summary: Bloom Energy (NYSE:BE) has entered a US$5b global AI infrastructure partnership with Brookfield focused on powering data centers. The company has agreed to a US$2.65b, 20-year offtake project with American Electric Power for a fuel cell facility in Wyoming. These agreements frame Bloom Energy as an onsite power supplier for large AI factories with multi-gigawatt, long-duration contracts. Bloom Energy sits at the intersection of distributed power generation and the rapid buildout of AI data...

headline: AEP Fuels Growth With Infrastructure Upgrades and Renewables
summary: American Electric Power invests in grid modernization and renewable energy as rising demand drives long-term infrastructure expansion.
